zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ufford I於1234年出生在英國素福爾可武福德時，他的父親John de Peyton II20歲，母親Agnes de Clemence21歲。他於1273年5月12日與Mary de Say在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1298年9月9日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可登維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ufford I于1234年出生在英国素福爾可武福德时，他的父亲John de Peyton II20岁，母亲Agnes de Clemence21岁。他于1273年5月12日与Mary de Say在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1298年9月9日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可登維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ufford I was born in 1234, in Ufford, Suffolk, England, his father, John de Peyton II, was 20 and his mother, Agnes de Clemence, was 21. He married Mary de Say on 12 May 1273, in Thurston, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 September 1298, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Dunwich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ufford I est né en 1234, à Ufford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Peyton II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Clemence, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Say le 12 mai 1273, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1298, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ufford I 1234 in Ufford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Peyton II 20 und seine Mutter Agnes de Clemence 21. Er hat am 12. Mai 1273 in Thurston, Suffolk, England Mary de Say geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1298 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunwich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ufford I è nato il nel 1234 nel Ufford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John de Peyton II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Clemence, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Say il 12 maggio 1273, nel Thurston, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1298, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunwich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ufford Iが1234年にイギリススフォルクウフォードで生まれた時，父John de Peyton IIは20歳，母Agnes de Clemenceは21歳であった。1273年5月12日にイギリススフォルクスウルストンでMary de Sayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1298年9月9日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクダンウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ufford I(이)가 1234년 영국 수폴크 퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Peyton II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Clemence(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1273년 5월 12일 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에서 Mary de Say(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 던위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ufford I nasceu em 1234, em Ufford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Peyton II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Clemence, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Say em 12 de maio de 1273, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1298, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ufford I родился в 1234 г. в местности уффорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Peyton II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Clemence, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Say 12 мая 1273 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1298 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности дунвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ufford I nació en 1234, en Ufford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Peyton II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes de Clemence, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mary de Say el 12 de mayo de 1273, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1298, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
